Coalition fracturing as Hormuz crisis deepens. 100 (capped, rising).

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 16 07:04 — IMMINENT STABLE. No major new developments since last scan. Direct talks still being arranged (Kushner/Dermer, Paris/Cyprus). Guterres ceasefire call stands. Israel says campaign will 'intensify.' 89 (stable).

Existing de-escalation: Israel-Lebanon direct talks still planned (Kushner/Dermer). Guterres ceasefire call. BUT: no progress reported, Israel says campaign will 'intensify.'

(2) Oman evacuation — signals US expects wider regional war. (3) Coalition fracturing — China/UK won't commit warships to Hormuz. (4) Pakistan strikes Kandahar — drone-for-airstrike tit-for-tat escalating.

latest_news.headline: Trump says Iran's supreme leader 'may be dead'
latest_news.text: President Trump stated Iran's supreme leader 'may be dead,' escalating rhetoric after earlier reports Khamenei was wounded. If confirmed, this could trigger regime collapse or desperate last-resort retaliation from IRGC hardliners.

latest_news.headline: Fresh missile attack on UAE Sunday morning — residents told shelter in place
latest_news.text: UAE authorities urged residents to stay in safe places as a fresh missile attack struck Sunday morning. Iran continues targeting Gulf states in retaliation for US-Israel operations. Fujairah oil operations resumed after yesterday's drone attack.

latest_news.headline: Extensive damage at Jask port, Hormozgan province, from US strikes
latest_news.text: Video and reports show extensive damage at Jask port in Hormozgan province, southeastern Iran, following US attacks. Jask is a strategic port on the Gulf of Oman outside the Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: China and UK decline to confirm sending warships to Hormuz coalition
latest_news.text: China and the UK declined to confirm they would send warships to help secure the Strait of Hormuz as Trump called on allies for a naval coalition. Coalition fracturing as major powers refuse to commit assets.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facility after Taliban drone attacks
latest_news.text: Pakistan launched airstrikes on a Kandahar military facility after Taliban drones struck Pakistani civilian areas and military sites. Third cross-border strike this week. Escalation cycle accelerating — drone-for-airstrike tit-for-tat.

latest_news.headline: US orders non-emergency staff and families to leave Oman
latest_news.text: US ordered non-emergency government employees and families to leave Oman due to safety risks. Previously considered a safe haven as mediator. Drones hit Oman this week — 2 killed in Sohar, fires at Salalah port.

latest_news.headline: Five US refueling tankers destroyed at Prince Salman Air Base, Saudi Arabia
latest_news.text: Five US KC-135 refueling tankers struck and destroyed on the ground at Prince Salman Air Base. Major blow to US aerial logistics in the Gulf theater. Six airmen identified from separate KC-135 crash.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills 2 more senior Iranian officials — 400 waves of strikes completed
latest_news.text: Israel killed two more senior Iranian officials, completing 400 waves of airstrikes since the war began two weeks ago. Systematic degradation of Iranian command structure continues.

outlook:
CRITICAL IMMINENT — Global war probability 85% IMMINENT (Day 16 07:04). ESCALATION ACROSS MULTIPLE FRONTS:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Trump says supreme leader 'may be dead' — regime decapitation claim. Fresh UAE missile attack Sunday. Jask port destroyed. Oman evacuation ordered. China/UK refuse Hormuz coalition. Coalition fracturing while Iran's selective blockade divides intl community.

(2) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 99 (capped, RISING): Pakistan strikes Kandahar military facility — third cross-border strike this week. Drone-for-airstrike tit-for-tat escalating. China-Turkey mediation failing.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 82 (rising): Continued bombardment. EU condemns Trump sanctions waiver on Russian oil. No peace talks.

(4) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 89 (stable): Direct talks being arranged. Guterres ceasefire call. Israel says campaign will 'intensify.'

(5) TURKEY → IMMINENT 71. DPRK → CRITICAL 47. RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77.

SEVEN IMMINENT, ONE CRITICAL, ONE ELEVATED. No new zones auto-created.

WATCH NEXT: (1) Supreme leader status — confirmed death triggers succession crisis OR desperate retaliation. (2) Hormuz coalition viability — China/UK refusal may collapse effort. (3) Oman's position — now unsafe, removing last ME mediator. (4) Kandahar escalation — Pakistan may launch larger operation. (5) Israel-Lebanon talks — only de-escalation path on board.
